description: Hệ thống giám sát toàn diện: Infra, APM, User Access, Database, Blackbox

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM "AccessLog" WHERE "createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT 
  "ip", 
  COUNT(*) as requests, 
  MAX("createdAt") as last_seen,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT "userAgent", ' | ') as agents
FROM "AccessLog" 
GROUP BY "ip" 
ORDER BY requests DESC 
LIMIT 50

SELECT 
  "createdAt", 
  "ip", 
  "userAgent",
  "userId"
FROM "AccessLog" 
ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC 
LIMIT 50

title: Hệ Thống Giám Sát Toàn Diện
